name: Container Firewall
description: Configures an iptables/ipset whitelist firewall for the container with selectable service tags and optional telemetry blocking

services.description: Comma-separated service tags to whitelist. Use 'minimal' for an empty baseline. Composite tags like 'claude-code' expand to multiple services.

extraDomains.description: Additional comma-separated domains to whitelist beyond the selected services.

blockTelemetry.description: Block known telemetry and tracking endpoints at the network level

policy.description: whitelist drops non-matching traffic; monitor logs but does not block

enableIPv6.description: Also apply whitelist rules to IPv6 (ip6tables)
